AR1.justification: Notes state 'did not modify the workspace — no daybook entry, no synthesized factors.md, no actions.md'; correct restraint but no positive routing decision, and a daybook log of the stall would have been defensible.

AR2.justification: Named the missing factors.md, refused to fabricate, and offered three options including an explicit 'skip discipline' user override — fully artifact-bound and even forecasts the eventual actions.md path.

AR3.justification: All references are relative paths; cites both runbooks/incident-postmortem/AGENTS.md and methodology.md by relative path, all resolve.

AR4.justification: No workspace writes — trivially idempotent on re-run.
